info.title: InvoiceFlow API
info.description: E-invoice processing platform with AI extraction and global compliance (PEPPOL, ZATCA, Brazil NFe, India IRP, Mexico CFDI, CTC reporting, and post-audit archival).

audit_log.description: Audit trail entries (included in detail view)

invoice_id.description: Null when processing is async; use task_id for tracking

post.summary: Register a new user and tenant

get.summary: List invoices with pagination and filters

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by invoice number or vendor name

post.summary: Upload an invoice file for processing

file.description: Invoice file (PDF, XML, PNG, JPEG, TIFF)

get.summary: Get daily invoice volume for charts

post.summary: Trigger AI extraction for an invoice

get.summary: Get extraction status for an invoice
